_setup_instructions.driver: Which SQLite driver this project uses. One of: 'better-sqlite3' (sync, Node), 'libsql' (async, Turso or local file), 'bun-sqlite' (sync, Bun runtime), 'd1' (async, Cloudflare Workers).
_setup_instructions.db_url_env: Environment variable holding the database URL. Defaults to DATABASE_URL.
_setup_instructions.schema_dir: Where per-table schema files are emitted. Each table becomes {schema_dir}/{name}.ts.
_setup_instructions.repository_dir: Where per-table repository (CRUD) modules are emitted.
_setup_instructions.validators_dir: Where drizzle-zod validators are emitted (only used when with_zod=true).
_setup_instructions.client_path: Path to the singleton Drizzle client module.
_setup_instructions.migrations_dir: drizzle-kit output folder. Both SQL files and meta/ snapshots must be committed.
